subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of the Blessed Perfection! This century is the century of attraction. This Cycle is the Cycle of His Highness the Lord of Lords
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان جمال قدم عصر عصر انجذابست و قرن قرن حضرت رب الارباب شرق و غرب
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @growth of the Cause, @effort; striving, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
